name: Reading Mode
description: Strip a page down to its readable content: hides sidebars, ads, sticky bars and footers, then re-centres the article with comfortable typography. Three themes (light / sepia / dark) and three font sizes. Toggle from the floating panel.

version.changelog: Improved article extraction (ad/sidebar penalty), reading time estimate, custom font size.

configItems.name: Theme
configItems.description: Background and text colours used in reader mode.

configItems.name: Font size (px)
configItems.description: Article body font size in pixels.

configItems.name: Reading column width (px)
configItems.description: Maximum article width. 720 is comfortable for most languages; lower for narrower lines.

configItems.name: Auto-enter on article pages
configItems.description: Automatically enter reader mode when the page contains a long-form article (>800 words).
